---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Application Settings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/applicationSettings"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Provides the application settings for a specific subscription or multiple subscriptions.
If your application is configured to receive CloudEvents, it will receive an Application-Settings-Changed-CloudEvent when there are new application settings available.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
